news.title: Anthropic in talks to acquire Stainless, SDK startup serving Google and OpenAI
news.description: Anthropic is reportedly in advanced talks to acquire Stainless, a startup that builds software development kits for AI companies, including Google and OpenAI. The deal could value Stainless at over US$300 million, according to The Information.

news.title: Trump Says Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Is Flying With Him To China—Refuting Reports Of His Exclusion
news.description: Earlier reports said that Jensen Huang was not in the list of CEOs invited to join Trump on the trip amid curbs on the sale of Nvidia’s most advanced AI chips to China.

news.title: OpenAI launches DeployCo for enterprise AI deployment
news.description: OpenAI has established a new entity DeployCo, the OpenAI Deployment Company, with over $4bn in initial funding.
